entry.title: Lot : le théâtre et l’opéra attirent malgré la crise sanitaire

link.title: Lot : le théâtre et l’opéra attirent malgré la crise sanitaire

entry.content:
Même si l’épidémie de Covid-19 est encore active en France, dans le Lot, certains évènements culturels s’appliquent à offrir un spectacle captivant tout en respectant les normes sanitaires imposées par le gouvernement.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Même si l’épidémie de Covid-19 est encore active en France, dans le Lot, certains évènements culturels s’appliquent à offrir un spectacle captivant tout en respectant les normes sanitaires imposées par le gouvernement. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Pesan Jokowi di Pelantikan Pamong Praja Muda IPDN Tahun 2020

link.title: Pesan Jokowi di Pelantikan Pamong Praja Muda IPDN Tahun 2020

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPASTV - Presiden Joko Widodo menghadiri pelantikan Pamong Praja Muda IPDN Tahun 2020 yang dilangsungkan secara virtual di 3 tempat berbeda.
Para Pamong Praja Muda mengikuti upacara dari kampus IPDN Jatinangor, Sumedang, Jawa Barat di Kampus IPDN Cilandak Jakarta Selatan dan Istana Bogor Jawa Barat.
Dalam Sambutannya Presiden Jokowi berikan pesan-pesan kepada seluruh pamong praja muda agar bisa menjadi motor reformasi birokrasi pemerintahan.
"kita perlu cara-cara baru, budaya kerja baru yang lebih inovatif, cepat, berani smart shortcut,"ujar Jokowi
Lulusan IPDN Angkatan ke-27 Tahun 2020 berjumlah 881 orang dan sudah diwisuda pada hari selasa lalu tanggal 28 Juli 2020 di kampus Jatinangor, Kabupaten Sumedang Jawa Barat.
6 orang calon Pamong Praja Muda mengikuti upacara di Istana Bogor dan bertatapan langsung dengan Presiden Joko Widodo, Mereka adalah para lulusan terbaik dari program studi yang berbeda.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPASTV - Presiden Joko Widodo menghadiri pelantikan Pamong Praja Muda IPDN Tahun 2020 yang dilangsungkan secara virtual di 3 tempat berbeda. Para Pamong Praja Muda mengikuti upacara dari kampus IPDN Jatinangor, Sumedang, Jawa Barat di Kampus IPDN Cilandak Jakarta Selatan dan Istana Bogor Jawa Barat. Dalam Sambutannya Presiden Jokowi berikan pesan-pesan kepada seluruh pamong praja muda agar bisa menjadi motor reformasi birokrasi pemerintahan. "kita perlu cara-cara baru, budaya kerja baru yang lebih inovatif, cepat, berani smart shortcut,"ujar Jokowi Lulusan IPDN Angkatan ke-27 Tahun 2020 berjumlah 881 orang dan sudah diwisuda pada hari selasa lalu tanggal 28 Juli 2020 di kampus Jatinangor, Kabupaten Sumedang Jawa Barat. 6 orang calon Pamong Praja Muda mengikuti upacara di Istana Bogor dan bertatapan langsung dengan Presiden Joko Widodo, Mereka adalah para lulusan terbaik dari program studi yang berbeda.

entry.title: Two MP girls ventured into the Pench river to take a selfie, get trapped in swelling water Oneindia

link.title: Two MP girls ventured into the Pench river to take a selfie, get trapped in swelling water Oneindia

entry.content: A life-threatening tragedy was averted in Madhya Pradesh’s Chhindwara on Thursday after local police and administration successfully rescued two girls who were trapped in the middle of a river. Despite restrictions due to the impact of Coronavirus and a ban on mass gathering, a group of 6-8 girls visited the Pench river in Chhindwara district’s Belkhedi village for a picnic. To take a ‘perfect selfie’, two of them sat on a stone in the middle of the river. Meanwhile, the water level of the river rose suddenly and they found themselves trapped. Looking at this, their friends informed the police administration about the incident. The police and the local administration along with the gram panchayat acted swiftly and rescued the girls safely.
entry.summary: A life-threatening tragedy was averted in Madhya Pradesh’s Chhindwara on Thursday after local police and administration successfully rescued two girls who were trapped in the middle of a river. Despite restrictions due to the impact of Coronavirus and a ban on mass gathering, a group of 6-8 girls visited the Pench river in Chhindwara district’s Belkhedi village for a picnic. To take a ‘perfect selfie’, two of them sat on a stone in the middle of the river. Meanwhile, the water level of the river rose suddenly and they found themselves trapped. Looking at this, their friends informed the police administration about the incident. The police and the local administration along with the gram panchayat acted swiftly and rescued the girls safely.

entry.title: Alaya F- I can never get sick of watching ‘Jawaani Jaaneman’

link.title: Alaya F- I can never get sick of watching ‘Jawaani Jaaneman’

entry.content: Alaya F says her debut film will always hold a special place in her heart, and its thoughts will always make her happy.

entry.title: EVENING 5: M’sia, Goldman Sachs settle over 1MDB

link.title: EVENING 5: M’sia, Goldman Sachs settle over 1MDB

entry.content: Wall Street bank Goldman Sachs has agreed to a US$3.9bil settlement with the Malaysian government over the 1MDB scandal. Meanwhile, Bank Negara says that while the loan moratorium will end, help will be on hand.
entry.summary: Wall Street bank Goldman Sachs has agreed to a US$3.9bil settlement with the Malaysian government over the 1MDB scandal. Meanwhile, Bank Negara says that while the loan moratorium will end, help will be on hand.

entry.title: Backseat Drivers: Dillon’s win is a stick in the spokes to playoff hopefuls

link.title: Backseat Drivers: Dillon’s win is a stick in the spokes to playoff hopefuls

entry.content: NASCAR.com’s Backseat Drivers give their hot takes on Austin Dillon’s win in Texas and how that shakes up the 2020 palyoff picture.
entry.summary: NASCAR.com’s Backseat Drivers give their hot takes on Austin Dillon’s win in Texas and how that shakes up the 2020 palyoff picture.

entry.title: fuite à Martigues: Kem one va devoir nettoyer et compenser les dommages

link.title: fuite à Martigues: Kem one va devoir nettoyer et compenser les dommages

entry.content:
Lors des questions aux gouvernement, le député de la 13ème circonscription Pierre Dharrevile a interpellé la ministre de la transition écologique Barbara Pompili à propos de l’usine Kem one et de la récente fuite de chlorure de fer ayant entraîné une pollution dans l’anse d’Auguste à Martigues. "Après deux arrêtés de mise en demeure en 2019, la responsabilité de l’entreprise est engagée sur la maintenance et la surveillance. At-elle assez investit dans  cette partie non productive des installations? Il faut reconnaître que des travaux d’importances ces dernières années ont eu lieu. Mais l’investissement de l’outil industriel n’est souvent pas à la hauteur. L’Etat doit exiger les transformations nécessaires à la protection des salariés, de la population et de l’environnement. Quelle mesure allez-vous prendre." 
E réponse, la ministre de la transition écologique a répondu: "Le jour même, l’inspection des installations classées s’est rendu sur le site et a vérifié que l’exploitant mettait tout en oeuvre pour supprimer la fuite. Pour l’heure il n’y a pas de mortalité piscicole, mais nous restons mobilisés. la Dreal analyse les risques d’écotoxicité. Le préfet a signé vendredi un arrêté d’urgence pour imposer à l’exploitant la mise en sécurité des installations, un rapport d’accident sous 15 jours et une surveillance, dans les prochaines semaines, de l’impact sur la partie terrestre, une surveillance à court et moyen terme de la partie maritime, l’évaluation sur le milieu par un expert compétent et le nettoyage des zones concernées. L’exploitant va devoir nettoyer les dommages et compenser les pertes en terme de biodiversité si nécessaire. La plus grande transparence sera faite sur cette affaire." 
 
écoutez l’intervention du député Pierre Dharrévile et la réponse de la ministre.  …
Vidéo publiée le : 28/07/2020 à 16:09:00
Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :
entry.summary: Lors des questions aux gouvernement, le député de la 13ème circonscription Pierre Dharrevile a interpellé la ministre de la transition écologique Barbara Pompili à propos de l’usine Kem one et de la récente fuite de chlorure de fer ayant entraîné une pollution dans l’anse d’Auguste à Martigues. "Après deux arrêtés de mise en demeure en 2019, la responsabilité de l’entreprise est engagée sur la maintenance et la surveillance. At-elle assez investit dans cette partie non productive des installations? Il faut reconnaître que des travaux d’importances ces dernières années ont eu lieu. Mais l’investissement de l’outil industriel n’est souvent pas à la hauteur. L’Etat doit exiger les transformations nécessaires à la protection des salariés, de la population et de l’environnement. Quelle mesure allez-vous prendre." E réponse, la ministre de la transition écologique a répondu: "Le jour même, l’inspection des installations classées s’est rendu sur le site et a vérifié que l’exploitant mettait tout en oeuvre pour supprimer la fuite. Pour l’heure il n’y a pas de mortalité piscicole, mais nous restons mobilisés. la Dreal analyse les risques d’écotoxicité. Le préfet a signé vendredi un arrêté d’urgence pour imposer à l’exploitant la mise en sécurité des installations, un rapport d’accident sous 15 jours et une surveillance, dans les prochaines semaines, de l’impact sur la partie terrestre, une surveillance à court et moyen terme de la partie maritime, l’évaluation sur le milieu par un expert compétent et le nettoyage des zones concernées. L’exploitant va devoir nettoyer les dommages et compenser les pertes en terme de biodiversité si nécessaire. La plus grande transparence sera faite sur cette affaire." écoutez l’intervention du député Pierre Dharrévile et la réponse de la ministre. … Vidéo publiée le : 28/07/2020 à 16:09:00 Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :

entry.title: Return of the Daily Briefings: Policy or Politics? - Subtitled

link.title: Return of the Daily Briefings: Policy or Politics? - Subtitled

entry.content:
NAT POP- Trump Press Conference
The President’s coronavirus press briefings were a network staple in the early days of the pandemic until they came to an abrupt end at the end of April.
Now the briefings are back with President Trump at the helm, and observers have noticed a distinct change in tone from the President.
SOT Trump Briefing
0.17 "It will probably get worse before it gets better, something I don’t like saying but that’s the way it is."
This renewal of the daily briefings relates as much to the President’s reelection chances in November as it does to the worsening state of the pandemic.
As he slips in the polls, the administration has changed tactics.
But some say, this is too little, too late.
Matt McDermott, VP Whitmann Strategies
0.40 "There’s nothing much that Donald Trump can say to the average voter that will really change their opinion on him as a President, and this election is a referendum on that Presidency."
Others say, the change in direction is about controlling the narrative. The return of the briefings mean that once again, the President is dominating the headlines.
Matt Klink GOP Strategist
1.00 "it’s a challenge for Joe Biden to insert himself into the news cycle and to drive coverage."
"While the press talks about a White House in dissarray, Donald Trump sucks all the air out of the room and dominates the media coverage."
With just under a hundred days to the election, party strategists suggest the race will be more competitive than the polls indicate and maybe this increased visibility will help to close the gaps.
Lawrence Tabas, GOP Chairman PA
1.27 "Over the years, the distrust for the media reporting amongst the Republicans and amongst Trump supporters is such that they just don’t trust the polls."
entry.summary: NAT POP- Trump Press Conference The President’s coronavirus press briefings were a network staple in the early days of the pandemic until they came to an abrupt end at the end of April. Now the briefings are back with President Trump at the helm, and observers have noticed a distinct change in tone from the President. SOT Trump Briefing 0.17 "It will probably get worse before it gets better, something I don’t like saying but that’s the way it is." This renewal of the daily briefings relates as much to the President’s reelection chances in November as it does to the worsening state of the pandemic. As he slips in the polls, the administration has changed tactics. But some say, this is too little, too late. Matt McDermott, VP Whitmann Strategies 0.40 "There’s nothing much that Donald Trump can say to the average voter that will really change their opinion on him as a President, and this election is a referendum on that Presidency." Others say, the change in direction is about controlling the narrative. The return of the briefings mean that once again, the President is dominating the headlines. Matt Klink GOP Strategist 1.00 "it’s a challenge for Joe Biden to insert himself into the news cycle and to drive coverage." "While the press talks about a White House in dissarray, Donald Trump sucks all the air out of the room and dominates the media coverage." With just under a hundred days to the election, party strategists suggest the race will be more competitive than the polls indicate and maybe this increased visibility will help to close the gaps. Lawrence Tabas, GOP Chairman PA 1.27 "Over the years, the distrust for the media reporting amongst the Republicans and amongst Trump supporters is such that they just don’t trust the polls."

entry.title: A three-storey building collapses in Bengaluru: Caught on Camera, watch Oneindia News

link.title: A three-storey building collapses in Bengaluru: Caught on Camera, watch Oneindia News

entry.content:
A three-storied building located in Bengaluru’s Majestic area collapsed Tuesday night around 10 pm. However, no casualties were reported as the police had evacuated occupants of the building a day ago. The incident took place next to a construction site where the city’s iconic Kapali theatre was located till 2017. The theatre was then taken down for a mall and a multiplex which is planned to be raised at the same location.
Fire Department officials said that timely evacuation resulted in avoiding casualties. Gandhinagar MLA Dinesh Gundu Rao, after visiting the spot, said the owner of the construction site next to the collapsed building should pay for the losses incurred due to the incident. He urged BBMP officials to loom into the matter as well
entry.summary: A three-storied building located in Bengaluru’s Majestic area collapsed Tuesday night around 10 pm. However, no casualties were reported as the police had evacuated occupants of the building a day ago. The incident took place next to a construction site where the city’s iconic Kapali theatre was located till 2017. The theatre was then taken down for a mall and a multiplex which is planned to be raised at the same location. Fire Department officials said that timely evacuation resulted in avoiding casualties. Gandhinagar MLA Dinesh Gundu Rao, after visiting the spot, said the owner of the construction site next to the collapsed building should pay for the losses incurred due to the incident. He urged BBMP officials to loom into the matter as well

entry.title: Rogue Trailer 09 01 2020

link.title: Rogue Trailer 09 01 2020

entry.content:
Rogue (Lionsgate Home Entertainment) Stars: Megan Fox, Jessica Sutton, Lee-Anne Liebenberg
Rogue is an upcoming American action film directed by M. J. Bassett, who wrote the screenplay with her daughter, Isabella. The film stars Megan Fox as a mercenary whose team gets trapped in Africa during a mission and is hunted by a lion. The film is scheduled to be released on August 28, 2020.
Initial release: September 3, 2020 (Russia)
Director: Michael J. Bassett
Screenplay: Michael J. Bassett
Producer: Michael J. Bassett
Music composed by: Scott Shields, Jack Halama
Production companies: M-Net, Mandate Pictures, LLC
entry.summary: Rogue (Lionsgate Home Entertainment) Stars: Megan Fox, Jessica Sutton, Lee-Anne Liebenberg Rogue is an upcoming American action film directed by M. J. Bassett, who wrote the screenplay with her daughter, Isabella. The film stars Megan Fox as a mercenary whose team gets trapped in Africa during a mission and is hunted by a lion. The film is scheduled to be released on August 28, 2020. Initial release: September 3, 2020 (Russia) Director: Michael J. Bassett Screenplay: Michael J. Bassett Producer: Michael J. Bassett Music composed by: Scott Shields, Jack Halama Production companies: M-Net, Mandate Pictures, LLC

entry.title: Saint-Tropez : les riverains se plaignent du passage incessant des hélicoptères

link.title: Saint-Tropez : les riverains se plaignent du passage incessant des hélicoptères

entry.content:
A Saint-Tropez (Var), les vols en hélicoptères continuent pendant la saison estivale, ce qui agace de plus en plus de nombreux riverains. Ils ne supportent plus les nuisances sonores.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

Bay Yanlış 5. Bölüm Tek Parça
(24 Temmuz Cuma)
Özgür (Can Yaman); zengin ancak salaş bir hayat süren, aşka inanmayan restoran-bar sahibidir. Ezgi (Özge Gürel) ise; artık yanlış ilişkilerden yorulmuş ve düzgün bir ilişki yaşayıp, evlenmeye kararlıdır. Ezgi’nin ilişki konularında başarılı olmadığını gören Özgür, kendisine ilişkiler konusunda mentorluk yapmaya ve Ezgi’nin hoşlandığı erkeği elde etmesi için ona taktikler vermeye başlar. Komşu evlerde yaşayan Özgür ile Ezgi zaman içerisinde neler yaşayacak?

Fatma Toptaş
Gürgen Öz

Serkay Tütüncü

entry.title: Madagaja ಚಿತ್ರೀಕರಣ ನಡೆದಿದ್ದು ಹೇಗೆ , ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ Mahesh ಹೇಳ್ತಾರೆ ಕೇಳಿ Filmibeat Kannada

link.title: Madagaja ಚಿತ್ರೀಕರಣ ನಡೆದಿದ್ದು ಹೇಗೆ , ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ Mahesh ಹೇಳ್ತಾರೆ ಕೇಳಿ Filmibeat Kannada

entry.content:
ಕೊರೊನ ಕಾರಣದಿಂದ ಬಹಳಷ್ಟು ಚಲನಚಿತ್ರಗಳು ನಿಂತಿವೆ. ಬಹಳಷ್ಟು ದೊಡ್ಡ ಬಜೆಟ್ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳು ಕೂಡ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆಗೆ ಸಿದ್ಧವಾಗಿದೆ. ಅಂತಹ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳ ಪೈಕಿ ಮದಗಜ ಕೂಡ ಒಂದು
Corona has stopped the film industry completely and so many big budgets have also been put on hold. Madagaja is one such movie
entry.summary: ಕೊರೊನ ಕಾರಣದಿಂದ ಬಹಳಷ್ಟು ಚಲನಚಿತ್ರಗಳು ನಿಂತಿವೆ. ಬಹಳಷ್ಟು ದೊಡ್ಡ ಬಜೆಟ್ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳು ಕೂಡ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆಗೆ ಸಿದ್ಧವಾಗಿದೆ. ಅಂತಹ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳ ಪೈಕಿ ಮದಗಜ ಕೂಡ ಒಂದು Corona has stopped the film industry completely and so many big budgets have also been put on hold. Madagaja is one such movie

entry.title: Amitabh Bachchan की Corona Report के Negative आने की खबर का सच? वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Amitabh Bachchan की Corona Report के Negative आने की खबर का सच? वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
After reports floated of Amitabh Bachchan testing negative for COVID-19, the veteran actor denied the news on his Twitter account and called it ‘fake’.Taking to his Twitter account Bing B wrote, ".. this news is incorrect , irresponsible , fake and an incorrigible LIE !!" Watch video,
हिंदी सिनेमा के महानायक अमिताभ बच्चन पिछले कई दिनों से कोरोना वायरस से जंग लड़ रहे थे. खबर आई कि अमिताभ बच्चन ठीक हो गए हैं. जी हां, माना जा रहा है कि बिग बी का कोरोना टेस्ट नि‍गेटिव आया है और उन्हें कुछ ही दिनों में अस्पताल से डिस्चार्ज कर दिया जाएगा. हालांकि अमिताभ ने खुद ट्वीट कर इन खबरों पर विराम लगा दिया है. पूरी जानकारी के लिए ये वीडियो देखें
#AmitabhBachchan #Corona #AmitabhCorona
entry.summary: After reports floated of Amitabh Bachchan testing negative for COVID-19, the veteran actor denied the news on his Twitter account and called it ‘fake’.Taking to his Twitter account Bing B wrote, ".. this news is incorrect , irresponsible , fake and an incorrigible LIE !!" Watch video, हिंदी सिनेमा के महानायक अमिताभ बच्चन पिछले कई दिनों से कोरोना वायरस से जंग लड़ रहे थे. खबर आई कि अमिताभ बच्चन ठीक हो गए हैं. जी हां, माना जा रहा है कि बिग बी का कोरोना टेस्ट नि‍गेटिव आया है और उन्हें कुछ ही दिनों में अस्पताल से डिस्चार्ज कर दिया जाएगा. हालांकि अमिताभ ने खुद ट्वीट कर इन खबरों पर विराम लगा दिया है. पूरी जानकारी के लिए ये वीडियो देखें #AmitabhBachchan #Corona #AmitabhCorona

entry.title: Maléfique : Le pouvoir du mal - Déjà Vu - Références et influences de cinéma

link.title: Maléfique : Le pouvoir du mal - Déjà Vu - Références et influences de cinéma

entry.content: Vidéo originale dévoilant les influences et références filmiques qui ont pu inspirer le réalisateur d’un film disponible sur CANAL+  www.canalplus.com/cinema/
entry.summary: Vidéo originale dévoilant les influences et références filmiques qui ont pu inspirer le réalisateur d’un film disponible sur CANAL+ www.canalplus.com/cinema/

entry.title: Respiratory Therapist Breaks into a Dance Dressed In PPE

link.title: Respiratory Therapist Breaks into a Dance Dressed In PPE

entry.content:
This respiratory therapist was preparing for the COVID-19 outbreak by getting the protective gear and equipment in place in the hospital. She created a light-hearted moment amidst the pandemic panic and broke into a dance dressed in her PPE.
*The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This respiratory therapist was preparing for the COVID-19 outbreak by getting the protective gear and equipment in place in the hospital. She created a light-hearted moment amidst the pandemic panic and broke into a dance dressed in her PPE. *The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: Affaire Darmanin : une ex-plaignante prend sa défense par SMS

link.title: Affaire Darmanin : une ex-plaignante prend sa défense par SMS

entry.content: C’est un retournement de situation assez inattendu. En février 2018, une habitante de Tourcoing déposait une plainte contre Gérald Darmanin pour « abus de faiblesse ». Cette femme affirmait « s’être sentie obligée » d’avoir des rapports sexuels avec l’actuel ministre de l’Intérieur en échange de quoi il lui obtenait un logement et un emploi. Les faits remontent à 2015, au moment où Gérald Darmanin était maire de la commune nordiste. L’affaire avait été classée sans suite par la justice.
entry.summary: C’est un retournement de situation assez inattendu. En février 2018, une habitante de Tourcoing déposait une plainte contre Gérald Darmanin pour « abus de faiblesse ». Cette femme affirmait « s’être sentie obligée » d’avoir des rapports sexuels avec l’actuel ministre de l’Intérieur en échange de quoi il lui obtenait un logement et un emploi. Les faits remontent à 2015, au moment où Gérald Darmanin était maire de la commune nordiste. L’affaire avait été classée sans suite par la justice.

entry.title: MP Board 12th Result 2020: MPBSE 12th के नतीजे घोषित, 68.81% Result Shivraj Singh वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: MP Board 12th Result 2020: MPBSE 12th के नतीजे घोषित, 68.81% Result Shivraj Singh वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education released the results of class 12 on Monday. This year, 68.81% of the total students have passed the Class 12th examination. Compared to last year, this year the pass percentage has decreased. Last year, 72.37% students achieved success. This year, Khushi Singh has secured first position in the examination with 486 marks. After that Madhulata Atmaja got 479 points and Nikita Patidar got 474 points in second place.This year, girls have achieved top 5 rank in arts stream. This year, a total of 73.40 per cent of girls succeeded in the examination, while the pass percentage of boys is 64.66 percent And big news of the day.
मध्य प्रदेश बोर्ड ऑफ सेकेंडरी एजुकेशन ने सोमवार को 12वीं क्लास के नतीजे जारी कर दिए. इस साल कुल 68.81% छात्रों ने कक्षा 12वीं की परीक्षा को पास किया है. पिछले साल की तुलना में इस साल पास प्रतिशत कम हुआ है. पिछले साल 72.37% छात्रों ने सफलता हासिल की थी. इस साल परीक्षा में खुशी सिंह ने 486 अंकों के साथ पहला स्थान हासिल किया है. उसके बाद दूसरे स्थान पर मधुलता आत्मजा को 479 अंक और तीसरे स्थान पर निकिता पाटीदार को 474 अंक मिला. इस साल आर्ट्स स्ट्रीम में टॉप 5 रैंक लड़कियों ने हासिल की है. इस साल कुल 73.40 प्रतिशत लड़कियों ने परीक्षा में सफलता प्राप्त की, जबकि लड़कों का पास प्रतिशत 64.66 प्रतिशत है. और दिनभर की बड़ी खबरें.
#TopNews #BigNews #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: The Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education released the results of class 12 on Monday. This year, 68.81% of the total students have passed the Class 12th examination. Compared to last year, this year the pass percentage has decreased. Last year, 72.37% students achieved success. This year, Khushi Singh has secured first position in the examination with 486 marks. After that Madhulata Atmaja got 479 points and Nikita Patidar got 474 points in second place.This year, girls have achieved top 5 rank in arts stream. This year, a total of 73.40 per cent of girls succeeded in the examination, while the pass percentage of boys is 64.66 percent And big news of the day. मध्य प्रदेश बोर्ड ऑफ सेकेंडरी एजुकेशन ने सोमवार को 12वीं क्लास के नतीजे जारी कर दिए. इस साल कुल 68.81% छात्रों ने कक्षा 12वीं की परीक्षा को पास किया है. पिछले साल की तुलना में इस साल पास प्रतिशत कम हुआ है. पिछले साल 72.37% छात्रों ने सफलता हासिल की थी. इस साल परीक्षा में खुशी सिंह ने 486 अंकों के साथ पहला स्थान हासिल किया है. उसके बाद दूसरे स्थान पर मधुलता आत्मजा को 479 अंक और तीसरे स्थान पर निकिता पाटीदार को 474 अंक मिला. इस साल आर्ट्स स्ट्रीम में टॉप 5 रैंक लड़कियों ने हासिल की है. इस साल कुल 73.40 प्रतिशत लड़कियों ने परीक्षा में सफलता प्राप्त की, जबकि लड़कों का पास प्रतिशत 64.66 प्रतिशत है. और दिनभर की बड़ी खबरें. #TopNews #BigNews #OneindiaHindi
